title: BOMBard
description: this mod ads 2 bombs currently only available in creative mode (c4 and a nuke) soon to be added into survival via crafting table.
body: this is a mod made to fill the c4 sized hole in my heart because after hours of searching on many platforms my hunt was in vain. so as i said half a sentence ago i decided to make this. this mod currently contains 2 bombs only obtainable in creative mode, that being the c4 if right clicked it explodes after 3 seconds and if trampled on or hits an enemy while throwing it just explodes imediatly, the second is a nuke that works as a bigger varient to the c4 but explodes when hitting the ground rather to staying for a victim.
